/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/ai-agent.dir/main.cpp.o" -o ai-agent  ../libai-sdk-core.a ../providers/anthropic/libai-sdk-anthropic.a ../providers/openai/libai-sdk-openai.a ../providers/bedrock/libai-sdk-bedrock.a ../libai-sdk-core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_json.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib
